doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: partial
reason: ABA Model Rule 5.5 is a real rule but its actual text focuses on multijurisdictional practice and lacks the invented subsections (b) and (c) shown here, which contain fabricated language not found in the genuine rule.
